description: Grid-Density Adaptive Risk Management Tier Configuration v2.0

tiers.name: PROBATION
tiers.description: Learning phase and catch-all for symbols not yet meeting higher tier criteria

tiers.name: CONSERVATIVE
tiers.description: Validated but underperforming; requires PF stability

tiers.name: STANDARD
tiers.description: Default tier for proven consistent symbols

tiers.name: AGGRESSIVE
tiers.description: High-performing symbols with significant track record

metadata.version_notes: v2.0: Replaced capital_allocation_pct with level_allocation_ratio for grid architecture

comments.level_allocation_ratio: Fraction of configured grid levels to activate (0.0-1.0). Always rounded to even for symmetric grids. Tier progression: 0.50→0.65→0.80→0.90→1.00
comments.leverage_multiplier: Multiplier applied to strategy_config leverage (1.0 = use config as-is). Applied after tier ratio determines active levels.
comments.max_leverage_cap: Hard cap on maximum leverage for safety (regardless of multiplier)
comments.profit_factor: Ratio of gross profit to gross loss (higher is better)
comments.sharpe_ratio: Risk-adjusted returns (higher is better, >1.0 is good)
comments.max_consecutive_losses: Maximum consecutive losses before tier demotion
comments.boundary_policy: How to treat thresholds; evaluated using tier_eval_order top-down
comments.pf_min_trades_for_validation: Minimum trades needed in lookback for PF to be considered stable
comments.tier_change_behavior: Grid parameters recalculated at next re-centre. No immediate grid restructuring on tier change.
